text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
After thinking about my goals for this year, I
made a card for you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen hands me a New Year's card.
Inside are her best wishes for the year, as well as
a printed goal.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes, I am in my classic year now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
As an Umamusume, I long to win the Triple Crown
races...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
And as a stayer, the Kikuka Sho is the one race
above all others that I don't want to lose.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Besides, if I win the Kikuka Sho, victory in the
spring Tenno Sho will be within reach!
choice_data_list: We'll win the Kikuka Sho for sure!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes, we shall attain this goal together!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now since that has been decided, I would like to
begin training posthaste, however...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
choice_data_list:
Let's build a solid foundation for your
endurance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
In other words, we should maintain the pace
we've set and proceed forward with diligence.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
In that case, you can count on me. I will follow
through properly, as I always do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You're suggesting nutritional supplementation,
then? I understand.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
This time of year, the cafeteria will be full of New
Year's dishes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I may have trouble choosing what to eat.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ah, so you're suggesting we deepen our
knowledge concerning the sites where the
Classics take place?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It's essential to have a strategy for each track in
order to win. I shall study them carefully.
